name: Humraaz
overview: A tragic event intertwines the lives of Sara, Ahmer, and Saim. When Saim becomes victim of an incident, he suspects Sara's involvement despite her denials. Their paths merge as they face truths and seek answers.

trailers.title: Humraaz | Starting from 1st May | Every Wed-Thur at 8:00 PM | Full OST | Har Pal Geo
